blocks.text: This Privacy Policy explains how Test LTD ("Company", "we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, stores, and protects personal data when you use https://voidborn.fun (the "Website") and the Voidborn game and related services (collectively, the "Platform").

blocks.name: Test LTD
blocks.address: 123 Example Street, Testville, TE1 1ST, United Kingdom

blocks.text: We are committed to protecting your privacy and processing personal data in accordance with applicable data protection laws, including the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR) and the Data Protection Act 2018.
1. Who We Are
Test LTD is the data controller responsible for personal data processed through the Platform. Our contact details are set out above.
2. Data We Collect
We may collect and process the following categories of personal data:

items: Account information: email address, username, password (stored in hashed form), and profile details you provide when registering.
Gameplay data: match history, deck configurations, rankings, in-game progress, and virtual inventory records.
Transaction data: purchase history, credit top-ups, internal shop activity, withdrawal requests, and related account balance records.
Payment-related data: payment status, transaction identifiers, and limited billing details. Full payment card numbers are processed by Stripe and are not stored by us.
Technical data: IP address, browser type, device information, session logs, and cookies or similar technologies.
Communications: messages you send to customer support and correspondence related to your Account.

blocks.text: 3. How We Collect Data
We collect personal data when you:

items: register for an Account or sign in through our authentication provider (Supabase);
play the game, use the portal, or interact with Platform features;
make purchases or top up credits via Stripe;
contact customer support;
visit the Website (including through cookies and similar technologies).

blocks.text: 4. How We Use Your Data
We use personal data to:

items: create and manage your Account and authenticate your access;
provide gameplay, rankings, the internal shop, and other Platform services;
process payments, credits, purchases, and withdrawal requests;
prevent fraud, abuse, chargebacks, and security incidents;
comply with legal, regulatory, and payment processor obligations;
improve the Platform, fix bugs, and analyse usage where permitted;
respond to your enquiries and provide customer support;
send service-related notices about your Account or the Platform.

blocks.text: 5. Legal Bases for Processing
Depending on the activity, we rely on one or more of the following legal bases:

items: Contract: processing necessary to provide the Platform and fulfil purchases you request.
Legitimate interests: fraud prevention, security, service improvement, and Platform administration, balanced against your rights.
Legal obligation: compliance with applicable law, tax, accounting, or regulatory requirements.
Consent: where required for non-essential cookies or optional communications. You may withdraw consent at any time.

blocks.text: 6. Third-Party Service Providers
We use trusted third-party providers to operate the Platform. These may include:

items: Supabase — authentication, database hosting, and backend infrastructure;
Stripe — payment processing for card payments and related checkout flows;
Hosting and infrastructure providers necessary to deliver the Website and game services.

blocks.text: These providers process personal data on our behalf under contractual safeguards and only for the purposes described in this policy. Their own privacy policies govern how they handle data within their services.
7. Cookies and Similar Technologies
We use cookies and similar technologies to operate the Website, maintain sessions, remember preferences, and — with your consent where required — analyse usage and improve performance.

Strictly necessary cookies are required for core functionality such as login, security, and payment processing. Non-essential cookies are used only where permitted by your cookie preferences. For more detail, see our Cookie Policy and cookie settings on the Website.
8. Data Retention

We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes described in this policy, including to provide the Platform, resolve disputes, enforce our terms, and meet legal, accounting, and fraud-prevention obligations.
When data is no longer required, we delete or anonymise it in accordance with our retention practices and applicable law.
9. International Transfers

Some of our service providers may process personal data outside the United Kingdom. Where this occurs, we implement appropriate safeguards — such as standard contractual clauses or equivalent mechanisms — to protect your data in line with applicable law.
10. Your Rights
Subject to applicable law, you may have the right to:

items: request access to the personal data we hold about you;
request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data;
request erasure of your data in certain circumstances;
object to or restrict certain processing;
request portability of data you provided to us;
withdraw consent where processing is based on consent;
lodge a complaint with the UK Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) or your local supervisory authority.

blocks.text: To exercise these rights, contact us at support@voidborn.fun. We may need to verify your identity before responding.
11. Security

We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect personal data against unauthorised access, loss, misuse, or alteration. No method of transmission or storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
12. Children

The Platform is not intended for users under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone under 18. If you believe a minor has provided us with personal data, please contact us so we can take appropriate action.
13. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The revised version will be published on the Website with an updated "Last Updated" date. Continued use of the Platform after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated policy where permitted by law.
14. Contact Us
If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your personal data, contact us at support@voidborn.fun or using the company details above.
